_meta.description: Curated round-trip train fare estimates per person for common home-city → airport routes in the EU. Used by R9 ITEM-053 to seed cost_eur for transit options at onboarding. User confirms/overrides at onboarding via inline [Adjust] button; all values flagged with confidence='medium' until confirmed.
_meta.source: Manual lookup against NS / Deutsche Bahn / SNCB / SBB tariffs, 2026-05

schema.rt_per_pp_eur: Round-trip per-person fare (off-peak, no discount card)

_meta.notes: Cost is round-trip per person to match SerpAPI flight pricing convention. The transport math layer (compute_mode_total) treats train as cost_scales_with_pax=True and multiplies by passenger count. For routes not listed here, onboarding falls back to a per-km heuristic OR conversational confirm.
_meta.key_format: Lookup by 'origin_city|airport_iata' — origin_city is lowercased free text (e.g. 'amsterdam', 'rotterdam'). Lookup is exact-match; no fuzzy matching.
